routeTypes.label: Book Route
routeTypes.description: A live Matrix Reprogrammed book or series route.

routeTypes.label: AI Answer Route
routeTypes.description: A structured answer page with confirmed, disputed, and evidence-boundary sections.

routeTypes.label: Network Map Route
routeTypes.description: A relationship map or power atlas route.

routeTypes.label: Evidence Route
routeTypes.description: A source lane, source card, evidence policy, or source hierarchy route.

routeTypes.label: Trust Route
routeTypes.description: A privacy, corrections, claim-label, methodology, or association-boundary route.

routeTypes.label: Conversion Route
routeTypes.description: A lead magnet, thank-you page, or reader-routing funnel.

routeTypes.label: Distribution Route
routeTypes.description: A content-format, script, podcast, newsletter, article, or social-thread brief route.

routeTypes.label: Authority Cluster
routeTypes.description: A topic cluster connecting pillar, spoke, trust, evidence, book, and funnel routes.

routeTypes.label: Freshness Route
routeTypes.description: A freshness lane or update-monitor route showing cadence, data files, outputs, and checks.

machinePages.title: Site Graph
machinePages.summary: Machine-readable graph of major Matrix Reprogrammed route types, route families, and crawl guidance.

machinePages.title: Claim Taxonomy
machinePages.summary: Machine-readable claim labels and evidence-boundary rules for public-record interpretation.

machinePages.title: Crawler Map
machinePages.summary: AI-search and crawler route map pointing to pillar pages, evidence lanes, trust pages, authority clusters, and reader paths.

crawlerGuidance: Start with authority-hub.html for topic clusters.
Use trust-center.html to understand editorial boundaries.
Use evidence-vault.html and evidence-vault-index.html for source lanes.
Use sales-ladder.html to understand reader paths and book routing.
Use update-monitor.html for freshness lanes and static-page warnings.
Use llms.txt and site-graph.json as machine-readable orientation files.
